concierge.title: Sunday — New Orleans Day
notes: 🏆 RISE Challenge (Virginia) — Stability accepted! Complete the application
🎤 InnovateSouth deck — finish it, time the pitch (must be under 4 min), upload to Claude for evaluation & improvements
⚽ Premier League morning if a match is on
🦞 Crawfish season — find a spot or make a plan
🎶 Porch party on Constantinople at 6pm (Ashley & Wendy)
💻 Light Reyla review — prep for the week, don't grind
🌙 Wind down early — Sunday is for restoration

private: 💌 She loves when you just handle the reservation without being asked
💬 Check in with Camille today — not just a quick text

blocks.label: Premier League Morning
tips: Match on, door open — perfect Sunday start
Coffee in hand, city waking up slowly

blocks.label: Walk to Tchoupitoulas
tips: Walkable from Napoleon & Magazine — beautiful stroll
Crawfish season in New Orleans on a Sunday. Life is good.

recommendation.name: Port of Orleans Brewing Co.
recommendation.note: Crawfish boil, cold craft beer. Walk down Tchoupitoulas.

blocks.label: Crawfish & Beers
tips: Order by the pound, cold beer, take your time
This is what Sunday in New Orleans is supposed to feel like

recommendation.name: Port of Orleans Brewing Co.
recommendation.note: Crawfish boil, cold craft beer, outdoor seating. Pure New Orleans.

blocks.label: Walk Back & Sno-Ball
tips: Stroll back up Magazine — stop in anywhere that looks good
Porch time with Chris & Vanessa if they're out

recommendation.name: Hansen's Sno-Bliz
recommendation.note: Best sno-balls in the city. Perfect stop on the walk back.

blocks.label: Light Reyla Hour
tips: One focused push — prep for the week ahead
Don't grind Sunday. One thing. Then put it down.

blocks.label: Bourbon Matinee Jazz Band with Chuck Brackman
tips: Fritzel's Jazz Club · French Quarter
Live tonight — courtesy of WWOZ & InkThorn Community Events

recommendation.name: Bourbon Matinee Jazz Band with Chuck Brackman
recommendation.note: Tonight at 5:00 PM. More info: https://wwoz.org/events/1351131

blocks.label: Porch Party on Constantinople
tips: Ashley & Wendy Lane's — live porch band every Sunday at 6pm
One of those only-in-New-Orleans moments. Don't miss it.

recommendation.name: Constantinople St Porch Party
recommendation.note: Hosted by Ashley & Wendy Lane. Live porch band, neighborhood crowd, pure Uptown Sunday magic.

blocks.label: Pete Olynciw
tips: Bacchanal (OUTDOORS) · Bywater
Live tonight — courtesy of WWOZ & InkThorn Community Events

recommendation.name: Pete Olynciw
recommendation.note: Tonight at 7:00 PM. More info: https://wwoz.org/events/1348401

blocks.label: Sunday Dinner
tips: Clancy's on Annunciation — classic Uptown white tablecloth
Or Shaya on Magazine — best hummus in the South

recommendation.name: Clancy's
recommendation.note: Quintessential Uptown Sunday dinner. Locals only energy.

blocks.label: Wind Down
tips: Good Sunday. Lived right.
Rest well — Monday is a full-send day.
